headline: Gilead (GILD) Wins FDA Approval for Trodelvy in TNBC
summary: Gilead Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ:GILD) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 25, 2026, the Food and Drug Administration approved Trodelvy from Gilead Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ:GILD) for two indications in adults with triple-negative breast cancer. The first approval covers sacituzumab govitecan-hziy as a single agent for the first-line […]
